reviews.content:
튀지 않는 무난한 디자인에 실용적이고 합리적인 포켓이 다양하게 자리하고 있음.
꽤 무거운 짐이 들었는데도 편안하고 안정적으로 지탱해주는 어깨 패드도 좋음.
디자인으로만 승부를 거는 여타 브랜드들과는 확실하게 차별화되는 실용성과 합리적 가격으로 많은 사람들이 찾을만한 좋은 선택이라 생각됩니다!

너무 큰 것도, 또 너무 작은 것도 부담스러워 하던 차에 만난 이스케이프.
일단 너무 눈에 띄지 않으면서도 무척 기능적으로 보였던 외관과 사이즈에 만족했습니다.
실용적인 크기의 포켓이 다양하게 갖추어져 있어 용도에 맞게 사용 가능합니다.
어깨 패드도 적당해서 꽤 무거운 상태에서도 편안하게 착용이 가능합니다.
이래저래 디자인만 쫓다가 가격까지 폭등하는 여타 브랜드 가방보다는 훨씬 실용적이면서 가격은 합리적인 선택이라 생각됩니다!
말도 안되게 때려박아도 다 들어가고 2박3일 여행짐으로 꽉꽉 넣어도 남음.. 진짜 괴물이고 캐리어처럼 거의 다 펼쳐지는거도 편함 수납공간도 많아서 여기저기 넣고 좋고 이정도 가격에 이정도 품질이면 상당히 좋음 .. 물건 많이 넣어도 등이랑 어깨에 착 붙어서 피로감이 적은거도 최고인듯
등산은 물론 일상생활에서 충분히 사용가능한 디자인과 넉넉한 사이즈, 그리고 다양한 수납포켓이 실용적이라고 생각됩니다. 거기에 가격도 정말 합리적이라고 생각되어 미련없이 선택하였습니다. 사용할 수록 저의 선택이 옳았다는 생각이 듭니다
Quality of this backpack is superb. It has useful pockets intended for it's purpose. It's a great value for money. Worth it every penny.

Bigger than you see. 
It’s got lots of pockets.
Useful.
Recommended.

I have had the smaller version of this rucksack for a couple of years, but needed the bigger version for a longer excursion. The rucksack is robust, able to carry a decent weight and volume, and comfortable to wear.

Super convenient and versatile! This Decathlon backpack comes with plenty of compartments, making organization effortless. It’s not only great for hiking, but also perfect for students, interns, and professionals as it fits a laptop comfortably. With its spacious 32L capacity, it’s also ideal for travel or balik kampung trips. Definitely a solid and reliable choice!
Seyahatlerim için kullanıyorum. Çok memnunum.
Excellent confortable, très bien pour ce que je fais
Sac utilisé dans le cadre de mon travail. Très adapté à mes besoins avec de multiples compartiments.
tres pratique et agreable à porter
siempre repito mochila, esta de 32 o al de 23 L, estan genial en cuanto a capacidad y compartimentos, polivalentes
Practical design that is convenient and allows sufficient storage capacity.
très bon sac à dos bravo à Decathlon !!!

From first look the bag was square and ugly. But the drawback ends there. It's light, has many compartments, easy and convenient opening, square shaped meaning space efficient, somewhat water repellent, good shoulder straps, feels solid, and cheap! It's now my favourite bag for short 1 week trips. It has a belt you can tie around your waist but I'm not sure if that thin belt helps to take any load off your shoulders. I'm thinking of how I can improvise in that area to make it an even more perfect backpack.
Dobry plecak na laptopa. Idealny również na wycieczki. Pojemny i wygodny.
Bir yıldan fazla oldu kullanıyorum hem kullanışlı hem çok sağlam

Super produit. Nous nous en servons pour partir en voyage et il est très serviable car beaucoup de rangement. Je l'ai complété en achetant un sac aspiration sous-vide d'air, et c'est vraiment top. Agréable à porter sur le dos.
durable
Útil
İyi çanta

The bag is great because it has multiple compartment but one of the biggest reason I bought this bag were the hidden pockets and compartment which in the new design it was removed and it is very disappointing.

I will still recommend this bag which is ideal for travelling.
Balo dùng hàng ngày được. Thích 2 túi hai bên hông để bình nước rất phù hợp.

I use it for work and commute. Find it lacking and disapointed after I found out that in this new version they remove several pockets unlike the one they have in YouTube.

Still given the quality and value for money I recommend this bag.
It has multiple compartments. And it has padded foam for added comfort

I needed a new EDC backpack. This is a good replacement for my previous EDC pack. I like the compartments, it is a great urban utility backpack. I think it is a bit of a stretch to use it for hiking unless it is short hike and easy terrain.
I don't like the waist strap but for the price it's ok. I will buy another pack to use exclusively for hiking.
Thiết kế đẹp

This 32L hiking backpack is the perfect size for a day hike or an overnight trip — spacious enough to carry water, snacks, an extra layer, and all the essentials without feeling bulky. The design is sleek and modern, making it look great both on and off the trail. It’s comfortable to wear and feels durable and well-made. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a reliable and versatile pack!
kaliteli ve sağlam bir çanta
Smooth Zippers, serves the purpose! large compartment and many zippers! Specially the Mesh sides where i can put large tumblrs!
Čvrst, praktičan, udoban za nošenje. Dimenzija ručne prtljage.

Durable
Value for money
Good for trainings and hiking needs
Comfortable
Has good capacity
Design are good
Has multiple compartments
the backpack is capacity is just what i need and the extra compartments is a plus
Great
Plenty of compartments, has 2 sleeves good for big and small laptop, even tab or pad. Good for backpacking, travel and hiking too since it has strap both on chest and waist.
havent used it for long travel so far so good

It’s a good back pack. Great capacity for all your stuff may it be for a 1 day trip or daily commute.
Lots of pockets. I like there is a pocket on the straps for your phone or small coin holder. You can also bring 2 1L bottles. I just would like if the added straps to keep the bag from opening if you didn’t close it close it properly and your stuff would come out of it.
Ergonomique, spacieux, repartit la masse de manière à ce que même lorsqu’il est chargé il paraisse léger
Le compartiment censé protéger un PC 17" ne permet même pas de glisser un ordinateur de 15". C'est incompréhensible et rend l'usage très limité
Bu fiyata premium hissettiren tek sırt çantası
Odlican i vrlo praktican. Koriste ga svi u obitelji.

運動包使用,放筆電的位置拿來放球拍
中間的大空間可以放鞋子,水瓶,替換衣物

出國旅行時使用
可以攜帶4-5日的簡單行李
包頂小空間可以方便拿取東西

做為一個多場景使用的背包
我覺得腰帶在不需要使用時
可以收納或拆卸是很重要的

肩帶上的手機袋放手機不太好用
我都拿來放藍牙耳機或零錢

包包的設計好像也有改版
有的影片介紹在水壺的位置有充電線出口
有的是有一個小的隱藏口袋
Stabiler vielseitiger Rucksack mit vielen Taschen.
Plecak sprawdza się idealnie. Jest pojemny, wygodny, mocny, zawiera dużo kieszeni. Polecam.
Wiele przegródek, doskonała jakość a wisienką jest 10 letnia gwarancja
Bardzo wygodny plecak z mocnego materiału.  Spokojnie można go zabrać na większe zakupy .
Parfait pour ordinateur 17' et petite lunchbox, idéal en sac cabine
Bon maintien, beaucoup de poches de rangement
Plecak ok, przeszedł jako bagaż podręczny
背包的容量大，非常適合旅行，可惜顏色選擇較少，且背包表面材質易起毛球，希望之後新品能改進。
Exactement ce que je cherchais

There is NO OTHER backpack out there for this value that comes with the level of comfort, capacity, multiple compartments, and design. It has surpassed my expectation, especially because the price, but I've been using it for a month and I'll never own another backpack again.
Velký batoh, super na cestování.
Za tu cenu super batoh na cestování
duży i pojemny. mocny bez przeszkód przetrwał nie naruszony Orlą Perć i Rysy

Bought for hubby who is very happy with his new backpack - used as hand luggage for a 4 day trip to Germany. Loads of space and compartments, comfortable and lightweight. Great value and will be used for years hopefully
Yıllardır aradığım çantayı sonunda buldum. Günlük kullanım ve kısa süreli seyahatler için birebir. Bölmeleri oldukça fazla.
Perfecto para viajar con! Tan cómodo! He probado muchas y este es perfecto para escapada o viajar con computadora con el trabajo
beau sac a dos pour des voyage etc....plien de poches
Bardzo pojemny z mnóstwem kieszonek. Jestem bardzo zadowolony. Wygodny w noszeniu.
pohodlné nošení, hodně kapes, vejde se do něj hodně věcí, naprosto splnil očekávání
Ich habe die kleine Variante und wollte etwas Größeres. Das Teil ist perfekt. Sehr gute Verarbeitung.
Todo bien. Se nota fuerte y espaciosa. La compré para mi marido que sale de viaje por uno o dos días por trabajo. Tiene espacio como equipaje de mano.

Overall, I love the rectilinear design with all the office cum hiking features. I was looking for a bag with waist and chest straps as my electronics are heavy but I didn't hike enough to buy a dedicated large bag, so this bag fits those expectations.

Pros:
- Bag is definitely better than an average office bag due to its back padding and rectangular form (better weight distribution).
- The various compartments added while maintaining part of the rectilinear form factor is nice (though they do seem unintentionally placed)
- Love the side bottle spaces inside their elastic pockets
- Material seems very durable, with no loose stitches/strings, and the zipper quality stands between Skybags and American Tourister (more towards the latter), meaning it's really smooth and good.
- 10 year warranty is unbeatable

Cons:
- Lack of raincoat for a non-waterproof bag and zippers make having expensive tech inside worrisome
- The first space with the laptop and tablet compartments can barely accomodate a book and paper file (but that's subjective as the 2nd space is big)
- Laptop compartment can barely squeeze in a laptop inside its sleeve - necessary since the bag isn't waterproof
- Wish there was some frame to maintain the bag's shape when placed on the ground, since it sags and folds itself unless it's competely filled (applies to wearing it too)
- The forward compartments are a bit risky to unzip fully as they could easily eject everything inside due to the flap completely turning outwards.

In an ideal world, the bag would be waterproof or have an in-built/free raincoat addon but all things considered, I look forward to using this bag for many years to come.
Correspond parfaitement à mes besoins, de bonne conception, apparemment robuste .Je pense acheter le même modèle la taille en dessous .
Liviana, de gran calidad y bonita.  Y lo mejor, súper espaciosa, pude volar con ella en cabina sin ningún inconveniente.

Extrem de bine proiectat. Materiale de calitate. Are atatea compartimente incat uti de ele. Zoba de Laptop+Tableta este fosrte bine dezvoltata. Materiale rezistente. Celalalt compartiment este extrem de spatios si nu afecteaza compartimentul de gadget-uri. Bretelele sunt foarte comode, nu pune presiune pe umeri, distribuie bine greutatea carata. Buzunarele laterale sunt gradate ca fiind pentru sticle de 1L. Intra sticle de 1.5L fara probleme.
Foarte incapator, forma care optimizeaza spatiul la maxim.
Spacious and many pocket/compartment
Rewelacyjny.

Szukałam plecaka typowo na podróże, ale nie tylko samolotowe, ale i np. pociągiem czy autobusem. Zależało mi na możliwie dużej kamerze głównej z łatwym dostępem. Sprawdziłam naprawdę wiele polecanych w internecie modeli i wiele było super, ale... Ale ostatecznie zostałam przy Quechua ;) Ten plecak wygrywa moim zdaniem stosunkiem ceny do jakości.

Ostatecznie zdecydowałam się też na model z większą ilością kieszeni a nie typowe jednokomorowe "worki" polecane na loty, które w podróży pociągiem, kiedy np. chce się mieć dostęp do biletów, słuchawek czy przekąski już nie są takie fajne. Z minusów widzę trzy główne: słaba odporność na wodę, brak pasków kompresji i dodatkowego uchwytu z boku (co jest popularne w podróżnych modelach). Z plusów: super jakość w tej cenie, kieszonki są funkcjonalne, górny uchwyt bardzo miękki i wygodny nawet, przy większym ciężarze. Ogólnie plecak był już przetestowany - jest estetyczny i wygodny. Nie jest idealny, ale chyba ideałów nie ma :) Ja jestem zadowolona z wyboru.
Super sac pour usage quotidien et voyage
Va muy bien, cómoda

สินค้าวัสดุดี แข็งแรงสีสวย จุของได้เยอะมาก
ราคาไม่แพง คุ้มค่าสุดสุด
สวยมาก ขนาดใหญ่กำลังดี
Souple, confortable, on peut le remplir de beaucoup de choses
This backpack is fairly durable and compact. Good compartments and shoulder support.
Pieno di tasche, molto comodo e utile
Répondu besoin pour un déplacement ou un voyage.

Plecak posiada bardzo dużo przydatnych przegródek. Starannie zaprojektowany i wykonany. Wygląd solidnie. Usztywnione plecy poprawiają komfort noszenia.  Wzmocniona dno wykonane z nieprzemakalnego materiału zabezpiecza zawartość przy opadach. Polecam
Nagyon praktikus, sok zsebbel rendelkezik. Jó vastag anyaga van. Nagyon kényelmes a párnázás a háton.
Es una mochia muy espaciosa. y tiene un montón de compartimentos. No conozco una mochila igual. Muy satisfecho con su compra!!
Ce sac est bien pratique, pour une utilisation citatine avec ce compartiment dédié à un rangement de pc. Mais ce sac est également agréable pour toutes sorties rando.
gayet güzel sağlam malzemeden yapılmış. en güzeli de sert değil.kisa süreli geziler için son derece ideal.

Très bien avec beaucoup de poches pratiques. Manque juste un peu de tenu lorsque il est un peu vide , il a tendance à s’affaisser et j’aurais aimé qu’il se tienne bien droit pour le poser plus facilement
Je suis très satisfaite de mes achats,  sac et chaussures de randonnée
Been using it for more than 3 years. Durable. Very useful. Has lots of compartments.
It’s a good size bag that can be used for any occasion.
Fantastic bag with amazing functional pockets. I only wish it came in 38-45l. 28cm is too thin by any backpack standards.

Gayet başarılı ve yeterli bir ürün göründüğünden daha şık bel tutuxu kısmı ve göğüs kısmı konfor sağlıyor her gün okula yürüdüğüm 8kmlik yolda hayatımı kurtardı diyebilirim
Pratique avec toutes les poches
Výborný batoh na víkendové cestovanie! Niet, čo vytknúť! Odporúčam!
Odlična torba. Kvalitetna, čvrsta, ima dosta mjesta, dodatne prostore za stvari.
Buena mochila
Bardzo wytrzymały i praktyczny
Goede, comfortabele rugzak met veel ruimte en vakken. Gesp van heupgordel zwak en zelf vervangen voor staal. Geen regenhoes, apart gekocht.
包的各种口袋非常多，方便隔离物品，背带也很舒服。唯一感到有些不足的地方是包的底部是皮的，这个时间长容易坏，碰到尖锐的物体，也容易被刺破。不知道设计师是怎么考虑的。
Good design and good size bag

Utilisé pour voyager en avion il y a 2 ans comme sac cabine puis en balades. On peut y mettre tout le nécessaire de voyage. Sac multi-poches fonctionnel, bandoulières confortables. Tellement bien que c'est le 2ème que j'achète pour un de mes fils voyageur car le premier a été "réquisitionné " par mon autre fils. Je vais devoir en acheter un 3ème 😄
Excelente qualidade de materiais e acabamentos.
Jak do tej pory jest to najlepszy plecak jaki kiedykolwiek miałem.
zaino capiente ed economico di discreta qualità

A fantastic backpack with multiple compartments and pockets that holds everything I need.
Dommage que la poche arrière ne soit pas extensible
Sac très pratique avec beaucoup de rangement
好背
já tinha 1 preta e comprei outra igual. Adoro

Plecak lekki, litraż 32 wydaje sie być większy niż nie jeden 35l plecak turystyczny przez co wydaje sie być bardziej pakowny. Idealny plecak na miasto, do pracy czy szkoły.
Jak na taki plecak stosunek ceny do jego użytkowania jest ok.
Z minusów:
- mała kieszeń która jest mega płytka jak dla mnie, mogłoby jej nie być albo powinna byc większą.
- kieszeń na telefon na szelce jest zbyt mała na smartfony (zmieści sie w niej chyba tylko Nokia 3210)
Love it. Very practical but still looks stylish.
Petit mais correspond parfaitement
תיק גדול

Nagyon jól pakolható hátizsák, könnyen és átláthatóan el tudom benne osztani a dolgaimat. A laptoptartó része kellően párnázott, a cipzárak pedig masszívan, mégis könnyedén járnak. Napi használatra és utazáshoz is tökéletes, többnapos üzleti utakra ugyanúgy bevált, mint túrázáshoz vagy egy egynapos családi kiránduláshoz. Merev, masszív kialakítású, igazán strapabíró darab.
This is a really good backpack. I use it for work. Seems to have loads of space and good side pockets for drink bottles. Highly recommended by me

pojemny, bardzo dużo przegródek, wygodny. polecam

very nice backpack. easy to use for travel

Great bag, have been using it for travel for a long time! Large capacity, separate pockets for laptop, water bottle etc
Trois and et aucune plainte ! Pratique tout ce qui faut et une bonne capacité pour tout (quel bonheur de voir qu'il y tient exactement un carton de vin !)
Foarte mulțumit de calitate!
Veramente un ottimo articolo, capiente, leggero, alternativa al trolley, molto pratico perché ti consente di avere le mani libere.
Simple efficace
najlepszy zakup. sprawdza sie na weekendy zimą, a latem na caly tydzień. służbowo, rekreacyjnie. dużo przegródek pojemnosc akurat.
Use it during my travel to japan. Walk a lot while using this backpack. Eventhough bring a heavy item for 20,000 steps, shoulder still okay. There are alot of compartment with easy access.
v good quality material and zips. Well designed with many practical compartments.

good

J’ai acheté ce sac non pour un usage de randonnée mais pour un usage professionnel ( professionnel de santé et d’urgence ) il me permet d’avoir énormément de place et en étant organisé / ce qui est pratique quand chaque seconde compte au niveau du confort il es très agréable même quand il es porté pendant plusieurs heures

En train, en avion, en moto, en rando, je l’emmène partout.
Ni trop grand, ni trop petit, son volume est bien adapté pour ce type d’utilisation.

I've been using this bag for more than 3 years now and I am still loving it. I use it for short trips, even when travelling as my carry-on for flights. Love the durability and multiple pockets. Highly recommended for work and travel. I only wish it was water resistant, but it isn't a big deal if I get a bag cover for it. Really love it.
Excellent produit

Bardzo pojemny plecak. W miarę trzyma swój kształt , ma bardzo dużo przegródek i schowków. Dość wygodny na ramionach, aczkolwiek plastikowe zapięcie od paska piersiowego pękło mi pierwszego dnia(zbyt ażurowa kostrukcja). Dla mnie to nie problem, bo plecak do miasta, a w góry mam coś innego. W tej cenie polecam.
Super, veľký a priestranný. Kopec vreciek na zips. Odporúčam :)
Très content car pratique beaucoup de poches de rangement idéal pour les voyages ou randonnées

Molto capiente e ben organizzato a livello di tasche l'ho trovato solo un po' scomodo nel sistema di apertura della tasca centrale che si apre sbilanciando completamente lo zaino ... anche la struttura sotto lo rende poco adatto ad essere lasciato in verticale essendo molto morbido sotto tende a cappottare in avanti in particolar modo quando non è pienissimo.
grande contenance

Šikovný batoh s jednou velkou vnitřní kapsou, jednou kapsou na notebook a tablet a spoustou malých. Zipy jezdí dobře a nezasekávají, navíc jsou dvoujezdcové. Material je relativně tenký, ale s gumou vespod, takže je alespoň vodotěsný.
This bag has enough space to carry essentials for a short trip. Weight of the bag is also light.
Excelent! Îl folosesc zilnic pentru că este ușor și confortabil, pot face  cumpărături pentru că este încăpător. În călătorii de până în 7 zile e singurul meu bagaj.
Très bon sac à dos, fonctionnel avec de belles poches, bons emplacements. Format bagage cabine intéressant
Parfait, fait le job sans problème, dommage vu le temps actuel qu'il n'y ait pas de housse anti pluie.
I found it great for travel purpose as well.
good
